articles.description: It took just five minutes for chants of "we are top of the league" to ring out around Turf Moor, as the title pendulum continues to shift towards Manchester City.
articles.title: Burnley 0-1 Man City: 'Queen bee' Pep Guardiola leads side to top of table

articles.description: Liam Rosenior lasted just 106 days at Chelsea. So what went wrong? And how did it go wrong so quickly?
articles.title: Inside Liam Rosenior's Chelsea reign: Respecting the ball and losing the dressing room

articles.description: Chelsea owners BlueCo have built a monument to chaos and decline at Stamford Bridge, says BBC Sport chief football writer Phil McNulty.
articles.title: Liam Rosenior sacked: Chelsea owners have built monument to decline

articles.description: Lamine Yamal injures himself as he scores a penalty that gives Barcelona a narrow victory over Celta Viga and extends their lead at the top of La Liga to nine points.
articles.title: Barcelona 1-0 Celta Vigo: Lamine Yamal injures himself scoring penalty

articles.description: With Wolves and Burnley now relegated, BBC Sport looks at which side is most likely to join them in the Championship next season.
articles.title: Premier League relegation fight: Two down, one to go - who will go down with Burnley & Wolves?

articles.description: Sean Longstaff scores a dramatic 97th-minute equaliser as Leeds take another step towards Premier League survival in an eventful draw at Bournemouth.
articles.title: Bournemouth 2-2 Leeds: Sean Longstaff hits 97th-minute equaliser to boost visitors' survival hopes

articles.description: For some snooker players, changing their cue would be a traumatic experience – not for Ronnie O'Sulivan, who cruised into the last 16 at the Crucible.
articles.title: Ronnie O'Sullivan's 'rolling the dice' cue gamble pays off at World Snooker Championship

articles.description: Two-time Major winner Bryson DeChambeau commits to staying with LIV Golf despite speculation about the tour's finances.
articles.title: Bryson DeChambeau working on new LIV contract

articles.description: Burnley's fifth consecutive relegation or promotion leads to the obvious question - how can they break the cycle?
articles.title: Can Burnley stop yo-yo effect - and do they want to?

articles.description: Mateus Fernandes is wanted by Paris-St Germain, Andoni Iraola and Cesc Fabregas are among the candidates to replace Liam Rosenior at Chelsea, and Barcelona want Marcus Rashford to extend loan stay.
articles.title: Football gossip: Fernandes, Rashford, Iraola, Fabregas, Trafford, Silva, Neto
